title: Role of Secondary Structure in the Adsorption Mechanisms of RNA onto Flat Substrates
author: Poblete, Simón
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Data and analysis scripts of Umbrella Sampling CG simulations of RNA under the effect of an attractive surface. 

 Trajectory files available upon request at simon.poblete at uach.cl
steps_raw:
Data and analysis scripts of Umbrella Sampling CG simulations of RNA under the effect of an attractive surface. 

 Trajectory files available upon request at simon.poblete at uach.cl
